name: Michael Masser
description: American songwriter, composer and producer of popular music (1941–2015)
abstract: Michael William Masser (March 24, 1941 – July 9, 2015) was an American songwriter, composer and producer of popular music.

about_quotes.speaker: George Benson
about_quotes.evidence: Michael Masser came to me... He said, 'I got this song I want you to hear... I'd like you to do it.'... We fought off everybody, and we created a classic.
about_quotes.doc_title: George Benson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Scott
about_quotes.evidence: Michael Masser he kept wanting, “Oh well let’s do one more, do one more.” So I don’t know how many takes I did.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Scott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 1, 2022 [interview 1 of 2]
